notes.en: Highest sugar content among SL banana cultivars measured (36.4 g/100g). Famous for the distinctive slightly-sour sweet balance.

traits.quote: Ambul cultivar recorded the highest sugar content (36.4 ± 1.69 g/100 g)

group.quote: Sri Lankan banana varieties can be divided into three main groups: the mysore, the kolikuttu, and the Cavendish. Examples of banana varieties coming within the mysore group are the ambul and seeni bananas
